title: insecure pull succeeds, secure pull complains about missing credentials
body:
When i list my registry as insecure, the pull succeeds:

```
Explicitly pulling image docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a
Asked to pull fresh copy of "docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a".
Setting authentication for registry "docker-registry.default.svc:5000" for "docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a".
Registry "docker-registry.default.svc:5000" is marked as insecure in the registries configuration.
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="parsed reference into \"[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage:overlay.skip_mount_home=false,overlay.mountopt=nodev,overlay.override_kernel_check=false]docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a\""
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="parsed reference into \"[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage:overlay.skip_mount_home=false,overlay.mountopt=nodev,overlay.override_kernel_check=false]docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a\""
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="copying \"docker://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a\" to \"docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a\""
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="Using registries.d directory /etc/containers/registries.d for sigstore configuration"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg=" No signature storage configuration found for docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="Looking for TLS certificates and private keys in /etc/docker/certs.d/docker-registry.default.svc:5000"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="GET https://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/v2/"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="Ping https://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/v2/ status 401"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="GET https://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/token?account=serviceaccount&scope=repository%3Aopenshift%2Fnodejs%3Apull"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="Increasing token expiration to: 60 seconds"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="GET https://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/v2/openshift/nodejs/manifests/sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="IsRunningImageAllowed for image docker:docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg=" Using default policy section"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg=" Requirement 0: allowed"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="Overall: allowed"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="Downloading /v2/openshift/nodejs/blobs/sha256:2a11e2ded5cc5b6d65514efad90a42526088209d14ebb59916c3a79bee1f9b7b"
time="2018-10-02T20:26:51Z" level=debug msg="GET https://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/v2/openshift/nodejs/blobs/sha256:2a11e2ded5cc5b6d65514efad90a42526088209d14ebb59916c3a79bee1f9b7b"
```


When I do not list it as insecure (but do provide a proper CA cert for it), the pull fails with an authentication error:

```
Explicitly pulling image docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a
Asked to pull fresh copy of "docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a".
Registry for "docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a" is not present in the registries configuration, assuming it is secure.
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg="parsed reference into \"[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage:overlay.skip_mount_home=false,overlay.mountopt=nodev,overlay.override_kernel_check=false]docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a\""
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg="parsed reference into \"[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage:overlay.skip_mount_home=false,overlay.mountopt=nodev,overlay.override_kernel_check=false]docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a\""
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg="copying \"docker://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a\" to \"docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a\""
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg="Using registries.d directory /etc/containers/registries.d for sigstore configuration"
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg=" No signature storage configuration found for docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a"
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg="Looking for TLS certificates and private keys in /etc/docker/certs.d/docker-registry.default.svc:5000"
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg="GET https://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/v2/"
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg="Ping https://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/v2/ status 401"
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg="GET https://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/token?scope=repository%3Aopenshift%2Fnodejs%3Apull"
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg="Increasing token expiration to: 60 seconds"
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg="GET https://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/v2/openshift/nodejs/manifests/sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a"
time="2018-10-02T20:13:33Z" level=debug msg="error pulling image: Error determining manifest MIME type for docker://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs@sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a: Error reading manifest sha256:a718a9daf8074aacd08e2de2679c067b39790f8e89e860f31d03e8fadd2d424a in docker-registry.default.svc:5000/openshift/nodejs: unauthorized: authentication required"
```

@nalind

comments.body: i resolved this on our side, the code looking up what credentials to use assumed the registry would be listed.
